daily.today_energy: Your grounding energy is *chef's kiss* today. The cosmos is giving you that calm-before-the-storm vibe—use it to realign with what actually matters. Channel that steady Taurus energy into something that feels real.
daily.love: Your heart's frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're single or taken, there's this quiet confidence radiating from you that people can't ignore. Let yourself be seen without overthinking it. Vulnerability looks good on you today.
daily.career: Stop waiting for permission to level up. Your ideas have weight today, and people are actually listening. Trust your instincts on that project or decision you've been sitting on. Your practical vision is exactly what needs to happen.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually *feel* things instead of just powering through. A walk, some water, maybe journaling—nothing dramatic. Just tune in to what your physical self is craving and honor it.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy invites you to lean into your natural magnetism, Taurus. Mercury's gentle influence suggests authentic conversations flow easier—trust your instincts about what (and who) deserves your time and energy.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your quiet confidence lately. Whether single or coupled, this is prime time for genuine connection. Skip the games and let your real self show up—vulnerability hits different when it's real.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving vibes are *immaculate* right now. Don't sleep on unconventional solutions to ongoing challenges. The universe is basically handing you permission to do things your own way this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional rest, not forced productivity. Honor what feels restorative—whether that's movement, stillness, or just unplugging. Energy management beats grinding, always.
